items.title: Trajectory-Consistent Calibration for Cache-Accelerated Diffusion Models
items.abstract: Diffusion Transformers require repeated denoiser evaluations during iterative sampling, making inference computationally expensive. Cache-based acceleration reduces this cost by reusing intermediate representations across denoising steps, but can introduce representation deviations and degrade generation quality. In this paper, we analyze these deviations and show that effective calibration should consider both the direct mismatch caused by reuse and the subsequent trajectory shift induced by earlier corrections. To address this challenge, we propose Trajectory-Consistent Calibration (TCC), a training-free method that calibrates cached representations toward their full-computation counterparts. Specifically, rather than estimating all calibration priors from a single uncorrected cache trajectory, TCC uses an offline iterative procedure so that each prior accounts for the trajectory shift induced by preceding calibrations. Experiments on PixArt-alpha and DiT-XL/2 show that TCC consistently improves FID across representative cache-based acceleration methods while preserving their underlying reuse policies. Notably, in a representative PixArt-alpha cache-acceleration setting based on FORA, TCC reduces FID from 29.83 to 27.35, slightly surpassing the full-computation baseline.
items.llm_evidence_en: training-free calibration for cache-accelerated diffusion models
items.llm_evidence_cn: 对缓存加速扩散模型的免训练校准方法
items.llm_evidence: 对缓存加速扩散模型的免训练校准方法
items.canonical_evidence: 对缓存加速扩散模型的免训练校准方法
items.llm_tldr_en: Proposes Trajectory-Consistent Calibration (TCC), a training-free method that calibrates cached representations in cache-accelerated diffusion models, improving generation quality without extra training.
items.llm_tldr_cn: 缓存加速扩散模型在重用中间表示时会产生表示偏差，导致生成质量下降。本文提出轨迹一致性校准（TCC），一种免训练方法，通过考虑直接偏差和轨迹偏移来校准缓存表示，使其逼近全计算版本。实验表明TCC有效提升了生成质量，且无需额外训练。该方法为扩散模型的高效推理提供了新的免训练优化手段。

items.matched_query_text: optimization methods that do not require training for diffusion models

items.title: Φ-Noise: Training-Free Temporal Video Conditioning via Phase-Based Noise Manipulation
items.abstract: Latent video diffusion models generate videos by progressively transforming Gaussian noise into realistic samples conditioned on text or visual inputs. However, existing conditioning methods often require additional training and computational overhead. Motivated by recent findings on the importance of frequency components in generative models, we propose a simple, training-free approach for motion-conditioned video generation by injecting low-frequency phase information from a reference video directly into the diffusion noise latents. Our method transfers motion cues without modifying the model architecture or inference pipeline. Using several applications, we demonstrate effective control over both appearance and dynamics in generated videos, while achieving competitive or superior results compared to more complex conditioning approaches.
items.llm_evidence_en: training-free temporal video conditioning using phase noise manipulation
items.llm_evidence_cn: 使用相位噪声操作的免训练时间视频条件控制
items.llm_evidence: 使用相位噪声操作的免训练时间视频条件控制
items.canonical_evidence: 使用相位噪声操作的免训练时间视频条件控制
items.llm_tldr_en: Proposes Φ-Noise, a training-free method for motion-conditioned video generation by injecting low-frequency phase information into diffusion noise latents, enabling control over appearance and dynamics without model modification.
items.llm_tldr_cn: 现有视频扩散模型的条件控制方法通常需要额外训练和计算开销。本文提出Φ-Noise，一种免训练方法，通过将参考视频的低频相位信息注入扩散噪声潜变量，实现运动条件化视频生成。该方法无需修改模型架构或推理流程，有效控制了生成视频的外观和动态。实验展示了多种应用场景下的有效性，为视频生成提供了高效的免训练条件控制方案。
items.llm_tldr: 现有视频扩散模型的条件控制方法通常需要额外训练和计算开销。本文提出Φ-Noise，一种免训练方法，通过将参考视频的低频相位信息注入扩散噪声潜变量，实现运动条件化视频生成。该方法无需修改模型架构或推理流程，有效控制了生成视频的外观和动态。实验展示了多种应用场景下的有效性，为视频生成提供了高效的免训练条件控制方案。

items.title: SEGA: Spectral-Energy Guided Attention for Resolution Extrapolation in Diffusion Transformers
items.abstract: Diffusion transformers (DiTs) have emerged as a dominant architecture for text-to-image generation, yet their performance drops when generating at resolutions beyond their training range. Existing training-free approaches mitigate this by modifying inference-time attention behavior, often through Rotary Position Embeddings (RoPE) extrapolation combined with attention scaling. However, these strategies apply a uniform and content-agnostic scaling across RoPE components with distinct frequency characteristics, inducing a trade-off between preserving global structure and recovering fine detail. We introduce SEGA, a training-free method that dynamically scales attention across RoPE components according to the latent's spatial-frequency structure at each denoising step. This adaptive scaling improves both structural coherence and fine-detail fidelity. Experiments show that SEGA consistently improves high-resolution synthesis across multiple target resolutions, outperforming state-of-the-art training-free baselines.
items.llm_evidence_en: training-free attention scaling for resolution extrapolation
items.llm_evidence_cn: 无需训练的注意力缩放用于分辨率外推
items.llm_evidence: 无需训练的注意力缩放用于分辨率外推
items.canonical_evidence: 无需训练的注意力缩放用于分辨率外推
items.llm_tldr_en: SEGA is a training-free method that dynamically scales attention in diffusion transformers for resolution extrapolation, balancing global structure and detail by adapting to spatial-frequency content.
items.llm_tldr_cn: 针对扩散变压器在超出训练分辨率时性能下降的问题，现有训练自由方法采用统一的RoPE缩放导致全局结构与细节矛盾的折中。SEGA提出基于频谱能量的动态注意力缩放方法，根据潜在空间的空间频率特征自适应调整RoPE组件，在不需额外训练的情况下显著改善高分辨率图像生成质量，并在多种分辨率外推任务中验证了其有效性。
items.llm_tldr: 针对扩散变压器在超出训练分辨率时性能下降的问题，现有训练自由方法采用统一的RoPE缩放导致全局结构与细节矛盾的折中。SEGA提出基于频谱能量的动态注意力缩放方法，根据潜在空间的空间频率特征自适应调整RoPE组件，在不需额外训练的情况下显著改善高分辨率图像生成质量，并在多种分辨率外推任务中验证了其有效性。
